name: Begistics Public Company Limited
summary: Begistics Public Company Limited operates a port in Bangpakong, Thailand. It offers container depot, warehousing, wharf, and other related services. The company also provides transport services with various types of trucks and trailers in Thailand and Myanmar; logistics solutions; stevedoring services, including vessel discharging, latching, and laboring; and shore-crane and mobile crane services at the port. The company was formerly known as Bangpakong Terminal Public Company Limited and changed its name to Begistics Public Company Limited in March 2018. Begistics Public Company Limited was incorporated in 1995 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
